---
title: "Residualsun"
subtitle: "Less is more"
image: "img/fallingstar.gif"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 20em
  image-shape: rounded
  id: hero-heading
  # links:
  #  - icon: twitter
  #    text: Twitter
  #    href: https://twitter.com/Residualsun1
  #  - icon: github
  #    text: Github
  #    href: https://github.com/residualsun1
# toc-location: right
listing: 
- id: blog
  contents: 
    - "../posts-cn/*/**/index.qmd"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"
- id: reading
  contents: 
    - "../book-review/*/**/index.qmd"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"
- id: english-writing
  contents: 
    - "../posts-en/*/**/index.qmd"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"
- id: r
  contents: 
    - "../r/*/**/index.qmd"
    - "../r/*/**/index.markdown"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
comments: false

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/about.css">
resources:
  - ../assets/about.css
---

<center>

::: {.btn-group role="group" aria-label="About"}
<a href="about.html"> <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary me-md-2 btn-sm">中文</button></a> <a href="about-en.html"> <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary me-md-2 btn-sm">English</button></a>
:::

</center>

::: {#hero-heading}
<!--
::: h1
About me!
:::
-->
Hello, I am Guozheng Huang, an ordinary junior student who likes to listen to Jay Chou and MY LITTLE AIRPORT when I am idle, Linkin Park when I am depressed, and Leslie Cheung when I am nostalgic.

Recently, I've been listening to my little airport, and "It's Raining for Two Days" always reminds me of a passage written by Liu Yisheng:

> "Rusty feelings again on a rainy day, thoughts playing hide-and-seek in smoke rings."

*Tears of SABINA*, *Summer Vacation Back to Middle School*, *Sad Whoremonger*, *The Year of Walking*, *Every Time You Go*, *For Telling It Like It Is*, and *Then the Formation Didn't Know It* are all very good, and are in my favorite style; in the words of Lechi, they all seem to be woozy.

I don't seem to have any hobbies, when I was preparing to go to elementary school my brother gave me a reading book, and from then on I began to contact reading on my own. However, the books I read as a child were of varying quality, and when I was in middle school, cell phones became popular, so I regretted not being able to maintain the habit of reading. It was not until I met Bing in college that I picked up the habit of reading again and tried to write a blog. If I may, I would like to say that reading and writing blogs are my hobbies. I changed the title of my blog from Kazuo Ishiguro's novel *"The Remains of the Day"*, but now I prefer to read books in the field of sociology and anthropology.
:::

## About this blog

::: grid
::: {#about-me .g-col-6}
This site is my second blog. I agree with Cyrus and Yihui's talk about [focusing on impact](https://yihui.org/cn/2019/03/influence-focus/). If I put all my energy into one blog, the content and impact of my writing will be better. However, considering my strong desire to express myself and my still abundant self-directed time, I want to write two blogs with different functions for myself. The first blog is my starting point in the blogosphere, and it is also the most important place for me, through which I have met several mentors and friends from the [capital of statistics](https://cosx.org), and found a way to express myself to myself, to others, and even to the world. It is a feeling that makes me feel solid enough to open it only for myself and a few friends, while the second blog is used to present my book reviews, argumentative writing, and English writing in the form of rich images.

I'm lucky if there are strangers out there who want to listen to my stories in this "accelerated" world, welcome :-)!
:::

::: {#about-me .g-col-6}
The following are blogs that I read often, and to me they are both strangers who have influenced me and mentors who I unilaterally believe have given me strength. It is because of them that I entered the world of blogging and writing, and I am grateful for the acquaintance and the destiny.

*In no particular order, sorted by time of recognition.*

<ul class="fa-ul">

<li><i class="fa-solid fa-certificate"></i>[谢益辉](https://yihui.org)：A man who influences many R learner, including me into blogging!</li>

<li><i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i>[叶寻](https://cyrusyip.org)：Good computer skills and willingness to help others</li>

<li><i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i>[列弛](https://www.liechi.org)：The first friend to leave me a message, a friend who keeps reading and reflecting</li>

<li><i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i>[袁凡](https://yuanfan.rbind.io)：A girl who regards herself as salarywoman while keeps up with her studies and is learning R as well as reading. I admire her a lot</li>

</ul>
:::
:::

<!-- end grid -->

## Lately......

::: grid
::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### 中文博客

::: {#blog}
:::

[所有 →](../posts-cn){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### 读书

::: {#reading}
:::

[所有 →](../book-review){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### English Writing

::: {#english-writing}
:::

[所有 →](../posts-en){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### R

::: {#r}
:::

[所有 →](../r){.about-links .subtitle}
:::
:::
